text: You attempt to head into the shiney museum but are stopped dead by the sign that reads “10 shillings to enter” Well shucks you think to yourself as you only have so much money… but well no ones here to stop you. With not a single smidge of guilt in your mind you walk right by the sign. As you walk around you don’t really notice anything except for the interesting exhibit named “Ancient Evil Here Please Don’t Open!” And well at this time of day the museum seems to empty so you might as well take a crack at it.

exit.trigger: Don’t open it and go back into the city
